factors.name: Liquidity Index
factors.comment: Excellent cash and bank balance ratios to cover short term payables.

factors.name: Profitability Ratio
factors.comment: Robust 47% profit margins, but sales operations overheads are slightly rising.

factors.name: Asset Efficiency
factors.comment: High stock turnover and modern depot utilization.

factors.name: Fulfillment Velocity
factors.comment: Supplier purchase order lead time has improved to 4.2 days.
